'''dhowafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stablelike|stablelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stablelike|stablelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhowafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhowafithi|dhowafithi]] || [[word:dhowafiji|dhowafiji]] || [[word:dhowafishi|dhowafishi]] || [[word:dhowafiki|dhowafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhowafuthuthu|dhowafuthuthu]] || [[word:dhowafujuju|dhowafujuju]] || [[word:dhowafushushu|dhowafushushu]] || [[word:dhowafukuku|dhowafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhowafuthu|dhowafuthu]] || [[word:dhowafuju|dhowafuju]] || [[word:dhowafushu|dhowafushu]] || [[word:dhowafuku|dhowafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhowafufthuf|dhowafufthuf]] || [[word:dhowafufjuf|dhowafufjuf]] || [[word:dhowafufshuf|dhowafufshuf]] || [[word:dhowafufkuf|dhowafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhowafethe|dhowafethe]] || [[word:dhowafeje|dhowafeje]] || [[word:dhowafeshe|dhowafeshe]] || [[word:dhowafeke|dhowafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhowafothotho|dhowafothotho]] || [[word:dhowafojojo|dhowafojojo]] || [[word:dhowafoshosho|dhowafoshosho]] || [[word:dhowafokoko|dhowafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhowafotho|dhowafotho]] || [[word:dhowafojo|dhowafojo]] || [[word:dhowafosho|dhowafosho]] || [[word:dhowafoko|dhowafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhowafofthof|dhowafofthof]] || [[word:dhowafofjof|dhowafofjof]] || [[word:dhowafofshof|dhowafofshof]] || [[word:dhowafofkof|dhowafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhowafïfthïf|dhowafïfthïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfjïf|dhowafïfjïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfshïf|dhowafïfshïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfkïf|dhowafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhowafïfthïfthïf|dhowafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfjïfjïf|dhowafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfshïfshïf|dhowafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfkïfkïf|dhowafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhowafïfthïf|dhowafïfthïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfjïf|dhowafïfjïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfshïf|dhowafïfshïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfkïf|dhowafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhowafïfthïf|dhowafïfthïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfjïf|dhowafïfjïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfshïf|dhowafïfshïf]] || [[word:dhowafïfkïf|dhowafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhowafæthæ|dhowafæthæ]] || [[word:dhowafæjæ|dhowafæjæ]] || [[word:dhowafæshæ|dhowafæshæ]] || [[word:dhowafækæ|dhowafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhowafathatha|dhowafathatha]] || [[word:dhowafajaja|dhowafajaja]] || [[word:dhowafashasha|dhowafashasha]] || [[word:dhowafakaka|dhowafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhowafatha|dhowafatha]] || [[word:dhowafaja|dhowafaja]] || [[word:dhowafasha|dhowafasha]] || [[word:dhowafaka|dhowafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhowafafthaf|dhowafafthaf]] || [[word:dhowafafjaf|dhowafafjaf]] || [[word:dhowafafshaf|dhowafafshaf]] || [[word:dhowafafkaf|dhowafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhowafasha|dhowafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhowafshësha|dhowafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhowafrosha|dhowafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhowafmusha|dhowafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhowafyasha|dhowafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhowafnkshësha|godhowafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhowafnkrosha|godhowafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhowafnkmusha|godhowafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhowafnkyasha|godhowafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhowawafasha|dhowawafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhowawafshësha|dhowawafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhowawafrosha|dhowawafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhowawafmusha|dhowawafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhowawafyasha|dhowawafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhowawafnkshësha|godhowawafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhowawafnkrosha|godhowawafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhowawafnkmusha|godhowawafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhowawafnkyasha|godhowawafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhewæfasha|dhewæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhewæfshësha|dhewæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhewæfrosha|dhewæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhewæfmusha|dhewæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhewæfyasha|dhewæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhewæfnkshësha|godhewæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhewæfnkrosha|godhewæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhewæfnkmusha|godhewæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhewæfnkyasha|godhewæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhowfafasha|dhowfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhowfafshësha|dhowfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhowfafrosha|dhowfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhowfafmusha|dhowfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhowfafyasha|dhowfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhowfafnkshësha|godhowfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhowfafnkrosha|godhowfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhowfafnkmusha|godhowfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhowfafnkyasha|godhowfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
